title: HubSpot Integration automation: When a new Company/Deal is added to list

posts.author: greg-hrc (Greg Collette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now that HubSpot has lists for Companies and Deals, it would be incredibly helpful to have Company and Deal automations similar to the When a new contact is created in HubSpot list… one.

For us, this would be especially helpful for Companies. Our Company board in monday.com in nearing it’s item max, but we don’t need to see anywhere close to the total number of companies in our HubSpot account.
